description: You are working on the 'fintech-core' project. A critical file, 'TransactionValidator.java', was accidentally overwritten with a stub implementation and saved. Because the change was not committed to Git, restore 'TransactionValidator.java' to its previous working state using IntelliJ IDEA's Local History. The restored file must contain the full validation logic, including tier limits (Standard, Gold, Platinum) and error codes. Ensure the project compiles successfully after restoration.
